steps.title: Use the contrast after although
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Hawaiian literature's heterogeneity with another quality. The explanation after the colon says scholars link works by later writers to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories, so the blank must name a lasting thematic connection across time.

steps.title: Reject weaker nouns
steps.content: A means delicacy or understatedness, and B means refinement; neither is shown by links to older stories. D means newness, which works against the idea of connection to tradition. The needed noun means ongoing connection. The answer is C.
